final_prompt.prompt:
Generate a professional documentary-style banner image for a Weibo news/hot topic post.

Style/medium: needs a documentary/news photography aesthetic with high-end mobile-captured realism — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be wide panoramic 16:9 horizontal format with ample negative space for text overlay
Subject: must include city skyline at dusk with pedestrians in motion
Scene/backdrop: must include urban cityscape at golden hour transitioning to night, distant skyscrapers reflecting sunset glow, neon signs beginning to illuminate
Lighting/mood: needs dramatic chiaroscuro with strong light-shadow contrast — exact light source balance is yours
Color palette: needs warm sunset tones transitioning to cool neon accents — exact color grading is yours
Materials/textures: needs sharp detail and high-resolution finish — exact grain and texture treatment is yours
Text (verbatim): must include "城市里的安静时刻" as main headline in bold/modern font, must include "黄昏，总能治愈一天的匆忙" as subtitle, must include "@龙爪槐守望者real · 生活观察" as watermark in bottom right or lower area
Constraints: must preserve 16:9 aspect ratio strictly, must maintain authentic on-site documentary feel, must allow ample horizontal space for text placement
Avoid: must avoid artificial or overly processed looks, must avoid cluttered composition that conflicts with text readability
